### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events')

## ITopicNameValidator Interface

Validates and derives pub/sub topic names per D6 convention \(\{tenant\}\.\{domain\}\.events\)\.
Defense\-in\-depth layer \-\- primary enforcement is via AggregateIdentity input validation\.

```csharp
public interface ITopicNameValidator
```

## ITopicNameValidator\.DeriveTopicName\(AggregateIdentity\) Method

Derives the canonical topic name from an aggregate identity with validation\.
Delegates to [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Identity\.AggregateIdentity\.PubSubTopic](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.contracts.identity.aggregateidentity.pubsubtopic 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Identity\.AggregateIdentity\.PubSubTopic') and validates the result\.

```csharp
string DeriveTopicName(Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Identity.AggregateIdentity identity);
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.ITopicNameValidator.DeriveTopicName(Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Identity.AggregateIdentity).identity'></a>

`identity` [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Identity\.AggregateIdentity](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.contracts.identity.aggregateidentity 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Identity\.AggregateIdentity')

The aggregate identity providing topic components\.

#### Returns
[System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')  
The validated topic name\.

#### Exceptions

[System\.ArgumentException](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.argumentexception 'System\.ArgumentException')  
Thrown when the derived topic name is invalid\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.ITopicNameValidator.IsValidTopicName(string)'></a>

## ITopicNameValidator\.IsValidTopicName\(string\) Method

Validates that a topic name conforms to the D6 pattern and is compatible
with DAPR\-supported pub/sub backends \(Kafka, RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus\)\.

```csharp
bool IsValidTopicName(string topicName);
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.ITopicNameValidator.IsValidTopicName(string).topicName'></a>

`topicName` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The topic name to validate\.

#### Returns
[System\.Boolean](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.boolean 'System\.Boolean')  
True if the topic name is valid; false otherwise\.
